title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入几内亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入幾內亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Guinea IGNM conformity requirements, EDG (Electricité de Guinée) grid-connection expectations, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in donor-financed project specifications, fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36558-2023, and GB/T 34120-2017 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与几内亚IGNM合格评定要求、EDG（几内亚电力公司）并网要求、捐助方资助项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與幾內亞IGNM合格評定要求、EDG（幾內亞電力公司）併網要求、捐助方資助項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, IGNM conformity scope determination, EDG grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Guinea IGNM Technical Regulations, EDG grid-connection technical specifications, applicable fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner or donor requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGNM合格评定范围裁定、EDG并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行几内亚IGNM技术法规、EDG并网技术规格、适用消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主或捐助方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGNM合格評定範圍裁定、EDG併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行幾內亞IGNM技術法規、EDG併網技術規格、適用消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主或捐助方要求。

answer_first.en: Guinea does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation enforced at the national level. The primary regulatory body for standards conformity is IGNM (Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie), whose current mandatory scope for BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources. The utility EDG (Electricité de Guinée) is the grid connection authority; EDG technical connection specifications for BESS are not publicly available and must be obtained directly. Guinea's grid operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz — nominally aligned with China's domestic grid — which reduces PCS voltage reconfiguration risk compared with markets using 240/415 V. However, the practical compliance gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Guinea are: (1) no publicly confirmed IGNM mandatory conformity certification route for BESS — project and donor specifications typically drive IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence requirements; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements referenced in donor-financed (World Bank, AfDB, IFC) project specifications; (3) EDG grid-connection technical approval — requirements must be confirmed directly with EDG before equipment design is finalised; (4) fire-safety installation requirements — Guinea has no confirmed BESS-specific fire code; IEC 62619/62933-5-2 and international best practice govern in donor project contexts; (5) UN 38.3 transport documentation mandatory under international conventions for lithium battery shipments through Port of Conakry; (6) humidity and dust derating — Guinea's tropical coastal climate imposes thermal and environmental stresses not addressed in Chinese domestic testing. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36558-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in donor-financed project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 几内亚目前无在国家层面强制执行的独立BESS产品安全法规。标准合格评定的主要监管机构为IGNM（几内亚标准化与计量研究院），其对BESS的现行强制范围尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。并网主管机构为EDG（几内亚电力公司）；EDG针对BESS的技术并网规格未公开，须直接向EDG获取。几内亚电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz——与中国国内电网名义上一致——与采用240/415 V的市场相比，降低了储能变流器电压重新配置的风险。然而，中国BESS出口几内亚的实际合规差距包括：（1）IGNM对BESS无经公开确认的强制合格评定路径——项目和捐助方规格通常驱动IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据要求；（2）世界银行、非开行、IFC等捐助方资助项目规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）EDG并网技术审批——须在设备设计最终确定前直接向EDG确认要求；（4）消防安全安装要求——几内亚无经确认的BESS专项消防规范；捐助项目背景下适用IEC 62619/62933-5-2及国际最佳实践；（5）UN 38.3运输文件——国际公约强制要求，适用于经科纳克里港的锂电池货物；（6）湿度和尘埃降额——几内亚热带沿海气候带来中国国内测试未涉及的热应力和环境应力。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36558-2023是生产基准，但在捐助方资助项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 幾內亞目前無在國家層面強制執行的獨立BESS產品安全法規。標準合格評定的主要監管機構為IGNM（幾內亞標準化與計量研究院），其對BESS的現行強制範圍尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。併網主管機構為EDG（幾內亞電力公司）；EDG針對BESS的技術併網規格未公開，須直接向EDG獲取。幾內亞電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz——與中國國內電網名義上一致——與採用240/415 V的市場相比，降低了儲能變流器電壓重新配置的風險。然而，中國BESS出口幾內亞的實際合規差距包括：（1）IGNM對BESS無經公開確認的強制合格評定路徑——項目和捐助方規格通常驅動IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據要求；（2）世界銀行、非開行、IFC等捐助方資助項目規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）EDG併網技術審批——須在設備設計最終確定前直接向EDG確認要求；（4）消防安全安裝要求——幾內亞無經確認的BESS專項消防規範；捐助項目背景下適用IEC 62619/62933-5-2及國際最佳實踐；（5）UN 38.3運輸文件——國際公約強制要求，適用於經科納克里港的鋰電池貨物；（6）濕度和塵埃降額——幾內亞熱帶沿海氣候帶來中國國內測試未涉及的熱應力和環境應力。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36558-2023是製造基準，但在捐助方資助項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
